title: App Version Parameters - Update
content:
# App Version Parameters - Update

Bulk update Parameters for multiple resources of a given App Version.
Parameters belonging to the App Version but not specified in the payload
will **not** be changed. Setting a value to `null` will cause the parameter
to be unset.  Additionally, it's also possible to set a comment for each
parameter change.

The source of the change will, by default, be the user making the API
request. If the user making the request is a Service Account, it can,
optionally, set its own source KRN.

## Endpoint

`POST /parameters/app/{app_name}/versions/{version}/update`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.deprecated_parameters.updateParametersAppVersion()
print(response)

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: Application key `name` to associate with Assets (resources) to perform the required actions.

source.description: The User or Service that initiates the bulk updates. Only Service Accounts can write to this parameter.

resource_parameters.description: Array of parameters to update for an Asset.

resource.description: The target Asset to which the parameters are to be applied.
